product.name: Endura Flap Pet Door for Vinyl Sliding Glass Doors | Weatherproof & Insulated Dog Door for Vinyl Sliders | Durable with Secure Locking Cover | White, XL Flap, 77.25"-80.25" Slider Height
features: SEAMLESS INSTALL: the Endura Flap pet door for vinyl sliders is designed for 'U' shaped tracks of at least 1-1/2" width; engineered for optimal insulation and energy efficiency to provide freedom for your pet while preserving your energy bills; extra large flap measures 12" x 23" and is suitable for pets up to 38" tall

MAXIMUM ENERGY EFFICIENCY: enhance your home's energy efficiency with our insulated pet door, featuring tempered safety glass; the durable and flexible flap remains functional even in -40 degree temperatures, providing your pet with easy access to the outdoors

EASY INSTALLATION: experience how simple it is to install and remove our pet door with the adjustable top and spring-loaded design, allowing for a fast, secure fit in your sliding glass door track; the white vinyl frame complements most interior designs and provides a stylish addition to your home

FOUR-SEASON PERFORMANCE: protect your home from harsh weather with our weather-resistant pet door, capable of withstanding winds up to 50 mph; the insulated flap ensures your home stays comfortable during winter, spring, summer, and fall, keeping the elements at bay

SECURITY & PEACE OF MIND: includes a secure locking cover, as strong as 1/16" sheet steel, providing added security and control when the pet door is not in use; the Endura Flap pet door is built to last, backed by a lifetime guarantee
